title: oligactis scandens
intro: Oligactis scandens, also known as the climbing milkweed, is a perennial plant species in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its leaves and roots are rich in saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including wound healing, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Oligactis scandens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
